g.text: Each doubling takes longer than the last

text.style: font-size: 13px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #6b7280

g.text: Semi-log₂ (log₂ cells, linear time): a straight line would be a constant doubling time — this curve bends.
